$schema: Issue tracker for oisee/vibing-steampunk — relevance to ARC-1

issues.title: SAP API Policy v.4.2026 impacts direct ADT endpoint use
issues.relevance: STRATEGIC: SAP's new v.4.2026 API Policy says 'every endpoint a customer or partner uses in productive use must be a Published API on Business Accelerator Hub'. ADT (`/sap/bc/adt/*`) is documented only as the Eclipse Java SDK, not as an external HTTP contract. Affects every ADT-based MCP tool including ARC-1. No direct code action — strategic question for the project's productive-use narrative.

issues.title: GetRevisions returns 404 for INTF and DDLS despite schema declaring support
issues.relevance: vsp uses /sap/bc/adt/oo/interfaces/{name}/includes/main/versions for INTF (404 — INTF has no includes; only CLAS does). ARC-1 uses /source/main/versions for INTF (likely correct). ARC-1 verify: run getRevisions on INTF/DDLS against test system to confirm we don't have the same bug class.

issues.title: Bug in CLI vsp search
issues.relevance: vsp CLI bug — different CLI surface than ARC-1.

issues.title: A few usage issues noted when refactoring code with Kiro and steampunk as mcp
issues.relevance: User feedback on Kiro+vsp UX — no specific bug actionable in ARC-1.

issues.title: vsp advertises support for --allow-transportable-edits, but rejected as unknown on real write commands
issues.relevance: vsp CLI flag bug — not relevant to ARC-1 (different flag set).

issues.title: WriteSource in the SAP MCP servers does not currently support ABAP include objects (INCL)
issues.relevance: vsp's WriteSource rejects INCL: 'Unsupported object type: INCL (supported: PROG, CLAS, INTF, DDLS, BDEF, SRVD, SRVB)'. ARC-1 already supports INCL in SAPWRITE_TYPES_ONPREM (schemas.ts:220), with case 'INCL' in buildCreateXml + objectBasePath('/sap/bc/adt/programs/includes/'). Win for ARC-1.

issues.title: runReport times out in WebSocket/APC context — REPORT_SERVICE uses sync SUBMIT
issues.relevance: ARC-1 doesn't have a runReport equivalent.

issues.title: HANA detection still fails on S/4HANA 758 — COMPONENTS endpoint returns 406, probe never reaches S4CORE fallback
issues.relevance: S/4HANA 758: COMPONENTS endpoint returns 406, vsp's probe doesn't fall back to S4CORE check. ARC-1 verify on a 758 system that capability detection has a fallback path.

issues.title: runReport times out in WebSocket/APC context — REPORT_SERVICE uses sync SUBMIT
issues.relevance: Duplicate of #115.

issues.title: MCP server does not reload cookies from --cookie-file after external session refresh
issues.relevance: ARC-1 reads SAP_COOKIE_FILE per request — verify hot-reload behavior matches expectation.

issues.title: get_user_transports returns empty while list_transports returns same data (follow-up to #9)
issues.relevance: ARC-1 has `getUserTransports`/`listTransports` separately — verify user-filter returns expected subset.

issues.title: Regression v2.32 → v2.36: 423 ExceptionResourceInvalidLockHandle on S/4HANA 758
issues.relevance: Lock-handle regression on S/4HANA 758 — vsp v2.36 introduced something that invalidates lock handles. ARC-1 uses withStatefulSession to share cookies/CSRF across lock→update→unlock; cross-check whenever we touch crud.ts.

issues.title: [Feature Request] Support for Creating Domains and Data Elements
issues.relevance: ARC-1 already supports DOMA/DTEL create+update via metadata XML writes (ddic-xml.ts). Win over vsp.

issues.title: ExecuteABAP false-negatively rejects $TMP via CreateObject packageExists() precheck
issues.relevance: vsp-specific package-existence precheck bug. ARC-1's safety system handles $TMP correctly via SAP_ALLOWED_PACKAGES default.

issues.title: CSRF token fetch fails (403) on S/4HANA public cloud and some on-premise systems — HEAD not supported by CL_ADT_WB_RES_APP
issues.relevance: CRITICAL: SAP has CL_ADT_WB_RES_APP handler that returns 403 for HEAD requests (used by all ADT clients to fetch CSRF token). Affects S/4HANA public cloud and some on-premise. Workaround: use GET with X-CSRF-Token: fetch header instead of HEAD. ARC-1 http.ts uses HEAD for CSRF fetch — verify GET fallback exists or add one.

issues.title: Support for S/4HANA on-premise systems accessed via SAProuter
issues.relevance: SAProuter proxy support. ARC-1 uses Cloud Connector for on-premise connectivity — different approach. Low priority unless SAProuter-only customers emerge.

issues.title: Feature Request: OAuth2 authentication for BTP ABAP Environment
issues.relevance: ARC-1 already has OAuth for BTP ABAP (oauth.ts). This is VSP's gap, not ARC-1's.

issues.title: [Bug] 423 'Invalid Lock Handle' when editing DDLS objects — LOCK and UPDATE_SOURCE executed in separate HTTP sessions
issues.relevance: Root cause confirmed: 423 errors on DDLS (CDS views) because LOCK and UPDATE happen in different HTTP sessions. ARC-1 uses withStatefulSession() which should prevent this. Verify CDS view update flow uses stateful session.

issues.title: Enhancement request for enabling new features via zadt custom api
issues.relevance: ZADT_VSP custom API. ARC-1 doesn't deploy custom ABAP.

issues.title: Bug Report: Invalid Lock Handle (Status 423) on Windows when Writing/Updating ABAP Objects
issues.relevance: Another 423 instance — this one on Windows. Likely same root cause as #98 (separate sessions). Cross-platform session handling issue. ARC-1 uses Node 22 + undici — verify cookie jar is not platform-specific.

issues.title: ExceptionResourceInvalidLockHandle (status 423)
issues.relevance: Recurring lock handle 423 errors. ARC-1 uses try/finally unlock in crud.ts — verify 423 handling.

issues.title: BTP ABAP Environment: Authentication fails (401) despite valid Basic Auth credentials on abap-web domain
issues.relevance: BTP ABAP doesn't support Basic Auth — requires OAuth. ARC-1 correctly uses OAuth for BTP (oauth.ts).

issues.title: ExceptionResourceInvalidLockHandle, EditSource, WriteSource, CloneObject, ImportFromFile
issues.relevance: More lock handle errors across multiple operations. Same pattern as #91 and #78. Verify ARC-1 lock handling.

issues.title: InstallZADTVSP fails on SAP_BASIS 7.40: package creation aborts install even when package pre-exists
issues.relevance: ZADT_VSP install issue on old system. Not relevant to ARC-1.

issues.title: WRITE operation failed
issues.relevance: User write issue — likely config/transport problem. Now closed.

issues.title: 423 ExceptionResourceInvalidLockHandle when updating PROG/CLAS on ECC 6.0 EHP7
issues.relevance: Lock handle errors on older ECC systems. ARC-1 targets 7.50+ but should handle 423 gracefully.

issues.title: graph fallback broken for namespaced objects: uses filesystem paths instead of ABAP names
issues.relevance: Call graph bug for namespaces. ARC-1 doesn't have call graph.

issues.title: InstallZADTVSP is not idempotent on ABAP 758 trial
issues.relevance: ZADT_VSP deployment issue. ARC-1 doesn't deploy ABAP.

issues.title: Add MCP support for CDS metadata extensions (DDLX/EX)
issues.relevance: ARC-1 already has DDLX read support.

issues.title: Debugger and other intrusive features
issues.relevance: Discussion about safety of debugger features. ARC-1 doesn't have debugger.

issues.title: CreatePackage safety check fails with 'operations on package empty string blocked'
issues.relevance: Safety check bug — checking empty string instead of actual package name. Verify ARC-1 safety.ts.

issues.title: CreateTransport fails on S/4HANA 757: wrong endpoint and content-type
issues.relevance: Transport creation endpoint differs on S/4HANA. Verify ARC-1 transport.ts.

issues.title: Quick question about the project license
issues.relevance: License question. Not relevant.

issues.title: Local code behaviour
issues.relevance: Local object behavior question. Not relevant.

issues.title: Failed to validate tool mcp_mcp-abap-adt_DebuggerGetVariables
issues.relevance: Schema validation bug for debugger tool. ARC-1 doesn't have debugger.

issues.title: Unable to create new program
issues.relevance: Create program issue — likely namespace or transport related. Monitor for patterns.

issues.title: [Bug] RunReport fails in APC context — all spool reading mechanisms blocked
issues.relevance: RunReport spool issue. ARC-1 doesn't have RunReport.

issues.title: [Bug] SAP_ALLOWED_PACKAGES blocks InstallZADTVSP — bootstrap chicken-and-egg problem
issues.relevance: Package filter blocks install tools. ARC-1 has same safety system — verify bootstrap tools aren't blocked.

issues.title: SyntaxCheck and UpdateClassInclude fail for long namespaced classes
issues.relevance: Namespace URI handling in syntax check. Verify ARC-1 handles /namespace/class correctly.

issues.title: Problem installing ZADT_VSP and bug using SAP_ALLOWED_PACKAGES
issues.relevance: ZADT_VSP install issue. Not relevant to ARC-1.

issues.title: Please delete accidentally created PRs #48 and #49
issues.relevance: Housekeeping. Not relevant.

issues.title: Error when using OpenAI / GPT models with active MCP-server in Eclipse GitHub Copilot
issues.relevance: OpenAI compatibility issue with MCP. ARC-1 should work with any MCP client but worth noting.

issues.title: Enhance sync script: fix oisee references in markdown files
issues.relevance: Repo sync script. Not relevant.

issues.title: Enhance sync script: auto-resolve CLAUDE.md/README.md conflicts
issues.relevance: Repo sync script. Not relevant.

issues.title: missing commands
issues.relevance: Missing CLI commands. ARC-1 is MCP-only.

issues.title: [Feature Request] Add translation/i18n tools for multilingual ABAP development
issues.relevance: i18n/translation tools — text elements, OTR texts, message classes. ARC-1 has T100 messages and text elements read. Translation management could be valuable.

issues.title: [Feature Request] Add gCTS (git-enabled Change and Transport System) tools
issues.relevance: gCTS integration — Medium #15 in feature matrix. Open in both VSP and ARC-1.

issues.title: GetTableContents: add pagination and schema introspection
issues.relevance: Table contents pagination. ARC-1 RunQuery has maxRows but no cursor pagination or schema introspection.

issues.title: EditSource treats syntax warnings as errors, blocking saves
issues.relevance: Syntax warnings blocking saves. ARC-1 edit_method may have same issue.

issues.title: 401 Unauthorized after idle should auto-retry transparently
issues.relevance: Session timeout auto-retry. Verify ARC-1 handles this.

issues.title: Cookie authentication
issues.relevance: ARC-1 already supports cookie-based auth.

issues.title: Build fails on macOS Apple Silicon
issues.relevance: Go build issue. Not relevant to TS ARC-1.

issues.title: Supporting of object types
issues.relevance: Feature request for more ABAP object types. ARC-1 already supports more types than VSP.

issues.title: GetTransport failed: transport not found in response
issues.relevance: Transport parsing bug. Verify ARC-1 transport.ts response parsing is robust.

issues.title: Tool Error DebuggerGetVariables
issues.relevance: Debugger tool error. ARC-1 doesn't have debugger.

issues.title: Streaming HTTP support
issues.relevance: ARC-1 already has HTTP Streamable transport.

issues.title: Packages not found when creating interfaces / classes
issues.relevance: Package resolution issue. Fixed in VSP. ARC-1 has different package handling.

issues.title: WriteSource fails for namespaced objects (URL encoding & truncation)
issues.relevance: Namespace URL encoding — same pattern as #52. Verify ARC-1.

issues.title: EditSource fails with 'Object already locked' on sequential edits
issues.relevance: Lock cleanup between edits. ARC-1 try-finally unlock should prevent this.

issues.title: Version for MacOS M1 is 2.20.0, not the latest
issues.relevance: Go binary distribution issue. ARC-1 uses npm.

issues.title: vsp does not honor HTTP(S)_PROXY in SAP Business Application Studio (BAS)
issues.relevance: Proxy support. ARC-1 uses axios which respects HTTP_PROXY by default.

issues.title: Using the tools is not clear to me (or the agent)
issues.relevance: UX/documentation issue. ARC-1 has intent-based routing which is simpler.

issues.title: Can VSP now create OData services?
issues.relevance: OData service creation question. ARC-1 has SRVB/SRVD support.

issues.title: Transport API returns 406 - Wrong Accept header for CTS endpoints
issues.relevance: 406 Accept header for transport endpoints — same class as fr0ster #22/#23. ARC-1 needs 415/406 auto-retry.

issues.title: feat: Re-add ALV capture for RunReport
issues.relevance: RunReport ALV capture. ARC-1 doesn't have RunReport.

issues.title: gui debugger
issues.relevance: GUI debugger feature request. Low priority #28 in matrix.

issues.title: self signed certificate
issues.relevance: Self-signed cert support. ARC-1 has SAP_INSECURE flag for this.
